# Senior Software Engineer Playbook

## Core Responsibilities
1. Deliver maintainable implementation aligned to architecture.
2. Protect quality through tests, reviews, and robust error handling.
3. Make system behavior explicit through interfaces and documentation.

## Implementation Checklist
- Requirement traceability matrix exists.
- API behavior and error handling are explicit.
- Data and UX dependencies are coordinated.
- Unit/integration contract checks are present.
- Observability hooks are included where relevant.

## Definition of Done Signals
- Acceptance criteria satisfied.
- Non-functional expectations respected.
- Regression risk understood and communicated.

## Anti-Patterns
- Large unreviewable change sets.
- Hidden side effects.
- Coupling business logic to infrastructure concerns.
